name: The Daito Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Daito Bank, Ltd. provides various banking products and services to individual and corporate customers in Japan. The company accepts time, savings, and foreign currency deposits; and offers mutual fund and government bonds. It also provides housing, car, education, card, free, expansion and renovation, and business and institutional loans; and pension and insurance, as well as financial product brokerage, investment trust, web account transfer reception, online payment/electronic money charge, and pay-easy fund transfer reception services. In addition, the company offers credit and debit cards, mail orders, safe-deposit boxes, and credit guarantees, as well as foreign currency exchange, automatic remittance, ATM, and Internet banking services. It operates through 58 branches. The company was formerly known as Daito Mutual Bank and changed its name to The Daito Bank, Ltd. in 1989. The Daito Bank, Ltd. was founded in 1942 and is headquartered in Koriyama, Japan.
